The '''580 freighter''' was an older model [[Light freighter/Legends|light freighter]] produced by [[Ghtroc Industries/Legends|Ghtroc Industries]]. It was not as impressive as some of the newer models, but it did have the advantage of a larger cargo capacity and longer operational times between replenishment. It was operated by a crew of one.<ref name="PP" />

==Known ships==
*''[[Venithon Bandit]]''<ref name="air">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>
